item.title: LLM 评估者对不同语言存在偏见
item.summary: arXiv:2607.14480v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM evaluators (trained reward models and prompted LLM-as-a-Judge) are routinely validated via pairwise accuracy. In a multilingual setting, this operates under the premise that high pairwise accuracy implies reliable, language-neutral scoring. We show that this assumptio
